18.08.2017 189 1586(अ) 27.12.2017 187 1451(अ) 18.08.2017 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training ) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th May, 2018. G.S.R. 510( E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Service Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of Rule 4 of Indian Forest Service (Cadre) Rules, 1966, the Central Government in consultation with the Government of Andhra Pradesh hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1966, namely :- 1. (i) These regulations shall be called the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Amendment Regulations, 2018. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1966, in the Schedule, for the heading "Andhra Pradesh" and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely :- “ANDHRA PRADESH SENIOR DUTY POSTS UNDER THE STATE GOVERNMENT 51 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Head of Forest Force 1 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Wildlife) & Chief MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th May, 2018. G.S.R. No. 511 (E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951) the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Andhra Pradesh hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Rules, 2016 namely:- 1. (i) These rules shall be called the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Amendment Rules, 2018. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette 2. In the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Rules, 2016:- (a) In Schedule II- A Posts carrying pay above the Time Scale in the Indian Forest Service under the State Governments, in the Table, for the entry “Andhra Pradesh” appearing in the first column and the corresponding entry in the second column, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “ANDHRA PRADESH Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Head of Forest Force Level 17 in the Pay Matrix Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Wildlife) & Chief Wildlife Warden Level 16 in the Pay Matrix Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests, (Administration) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Vigilance) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Social Forestry) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Budget & Campa) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Red Sanders.) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix Chief Conservator Forests (Production) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix Chief Conservator Forests (Research and IT) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix Chief Conservator Forests (FCA) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix Chief Conservator Forests (Coastal Zone Management) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix Chief Conservator Forests (Zoo Parks) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix Chief Conservator Forests (Working Plan) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix Conservator of Forests, Kurnool Circle Level 13A in the Pay Matrix Conservator of Forests, Rajahmundry Circle Level 13A in the Pay Matrix Conservator of
